name: pong-gleam
description: Gleam Pong game with JavaScript testing and SonarQube integration

scripts.build: gleam build --target javascript && cp canvas_ffi.mjs build/dev/javascript/pong/
scripts.test: npm run build && gleam test --target javascript
scripts.test:coverage: npm run build && c8 --reporter=text --reporter=json-summary sh -c 'gleam test --target javascript && node --test test/canvas_ffi.test.mjs'
